title: native federation slim builder
description: builder for native federation apps that only produces federation artifacts and serves them over a minimal Vite static server (no Angular application build)

tsConfig.description: Path to the tsconfig used to compile the exposed modules and shared mappings.

dev.description: Set this to true to start the builder in dev mode

index.description: Configures the HTML file copied into the output directory. Accepts a string path to an HTML file, an object with explicit input/output paths, or `false` to skip emitting any index. When omitted, a minimal placeholder index.html is written.

input.description: Path to the source HTML file (relative to the workspace root).

output.description: Output file name written into the output directory.

oneOf.description: Set to false to skip writing any index.html.

rebuildDelay.description: The delay for rebuilding federation artifacts. This allows to have more resources for refreshing your micro frontend in the browser.

cacheExternalArtifacts.description: Will cache the shared externals so they can be re-used between builds

enable.description: Enable build completion notifications for local development. It will send events to notify when the federation build is complete.

endpoint.description: You can override the default endpoint to send build completion events to.

assets.description: Assets to copy into the output directory. Same shape as @angular/build:application 'assets'.

stylePreprocessorOptions.description: Options passed to style preprocessors (e.g. Sass includePaths).

inlineStyleLanguage.description: Preprocessor language for inline component styles.

fileReplacements.description: Replace files listed in the build at compile time.

preserveSymlinks.description: Do not use the real path when resolving modules.
